posts.text: Israel Hume reported that following the emerging agreement between the United States and the Islamic Republic, Israeli security agencies have been asked to develop a new strategy towards Iran.
posts.author: zerohedge

posts.text: Sir Keir Starmer’s plan to ban social media for kids is already facing flak. Even before the policy’s announcement it was assailed by the opposition for not doing enough               https://www.economist.com/britain/2026/06/11/a-kids-social-media-ban-would-be-a-bad-parting-gift-from-keir-starmer?taid=6a318a77fbb36b0001befa57&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter
posts.author: TheEconomist

posts.text: BREAKING: US oil prices extend losses to -7% on the day, falling below $76/barrel, on news that the US-Iran deal is expected to include sanctions relief.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter

posts.text: (1) HydroGraph Clean Power Inc. has announced an official partnership with Modern Dispersions, Inc. (MDI), where MDI is certified as a qualified compounding partner for large-scale graphene production in North America. >>>>>>>>
